title: Wapol’s Shadow Returns
description: On pages 17–20, wapol’s shadow returns as dalton shelters the crew and explains Drum Island’s fall under Wapol while the search for the island’s last doctor continues.
scene: Wapol’s Shadow Returns. Dalton shelters the crew and explains Drum Island’s fall under Wapol while the search for the island’s last doctor continues. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Then let's go, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Before Nami dies!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Don't say that, you idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: I wonder if they'll really be fine...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Well, there's no need to worry about those 2 but...

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: The problem is whether or not Nami can hold out long enough...

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: I just hope they can all get to the top safe and sound...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: What's wrong? You should come inside already, it's quite cold outside...

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: It's fine... I... I want to stay outside for now...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Me too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Why don't I join you then...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: It used not to be like this long ago...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The doctors, I mean. There's a reason why all of them save for one disappeared...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Only a few months ago, this country was...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: utterly destroyed at the hands of pirates...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What-

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: The entire country!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So that's why you were so hostile to us...

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Yes... everyone is still uneasy at merely hearing the word, "pirate"...

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: It was a pirate crew of only 5 people...

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Their captain called himself, "Blackbeard"...

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: with overwhelming strength, they destroyed our entire country in the blink of an eye.

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: O-only five pirates!? That's crazy!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Black- Beard...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: be that as it may... there are some who say it was a good thing that our country was destroyed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What!? There's no way it'd be a good thing for one's country to be destroyed!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, that's ridiculous! How could that be!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's because up until that point,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The King and his tyrannical Rule brought much suffering to the people.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: ...the name of this country was formerly "drum kingdom" and the ruler of this kingdom was a man named "Wapol!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He was truly a most despicable King...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Ah! that man...! Now I remember!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Wapol!?

summary: This part centers on wapol’s shadow returns, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
